title: Documenting AI-Assisted Decisions for Data Lineage
summary: Lineage for AI means linking a decision to file version, filters, charts, and questions asked.

content.summary: Lineage for AI means linking a decision to file version, filters, charts, and questions asked.

body.text: Future you will forget why March revenue looked low. Documentation beats memory. File name and upload timestamp, saved rule name and version, chart screenshots, Talk to Data prompts and responses. Store alongside slide decks so reviewers reconstruct the path from raw export to executive bullet.

body.alt: Charts and graphs for business reporting
body.caption: Charts and graphs for business reporting. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: File name and upload timestamp, saved rule name and version, chart screenshots, Talk to Data prompts and responses.
Store alongside slide decks so reviewers reconstruct the path from raw export to executive bullet.

items: Footnote rule names on every external chart.
Archive weekly upload hashes or row counts.
Log prompt templates when definitions change.

body.text: You do not need a warehouse for basic lineage—disciplined file workflows suffice for many teams.
Lineage documentation also speeds onboarding when analysts rotate.
Datilio's upload-filter-chart-AI path gives you concrete artifacts to attach to every decision.

meta_description: Lineage for AI means linking a decision to file version, filters, charts, and questions asked.
